typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-semibold

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing philosophy, use p-8 or p-12 for containers.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 with wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12).
spacing_and_layout.bento_card: Internal padding p-6 or p-8. Do not exceed 80vh for mobile image heights.
spacing_and_layout.hero_overlay: bg-black/40 or bg-gradient-to-r from-black/70 via-black/40 to-transparent for text contrast.

components.navbar: Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) with 1px border-b border-border/40. Fixed top z-50.
components.buttons: Shadcn UI base. Primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90. Secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-primary hover:bg-muted.
components.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-border), no default shadow. Hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, border-border darkens.
components.estimator_form: Shadcn UI cards, distinct inputs, clear data-testid on all interactive elements.
components.before_after_slider: Functional slider component overlaid on two images, standard input range or customized thumb.
components.multi_step_booking: Step indicators, Shadcn form, calendar for date/time picker, clean transitions between steps.
components.dashboard_table: Shadcn table, crisp edges, subtle roundness (max 8px radius).

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 or 2 for clarity. Color: primary or muted-foreground based on context.

animations.hover: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease.
animations.reveal: Use framer-motion for simple fade-up on scroll (opacity 0 to 1, y 20 to 0) for grid items.

hero_background.description: Green grass field with trees, perfectly suited for the hero background.

portfolio_before.description: Brown dried leaves on dirt ground.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use Romanian text throughout the UI.
Ensure ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) have a data-testid attribute.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body.
Never use purely transparent headers over hero images; apply glassmorphism.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts, but strictly Shadcn UI components for interactivity (Forms, Tabs, Modals).
Follow 'Organic & Earthy' theme: Avoid neon/cyberpunk styles. Use the provided earthy color palette.
Implement the before/after slider correctly with an input[type='range'] over absolute positioned images.
The multi-step scheduling system must validate step-by-step.
The Cost Estimator must dynamically update price as surface area and checkboxes change.
In the Admin Dashboard, appointments table must have status badges and toggling (e.g. Pending -> Confirmed).
You have .js files not .tsx files, so strictly use JavaScript/JSX and avoid TypeScript types or interfaces.
